series_metadata.series_description: Copies of receipt (proof) that a secured records storage facility received and returned back-up tapes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until entered into database, then shred. Retain database until superseded by next cycle, then erase. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until entered into database, then shred. Retain database until superseded by next cycle, then erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
